Interface NameReference

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, SourceElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
TypeReferenceInfix
All Known Implementing Classes:
Break, Continue, FieldReference, LabelJumpStatement, MethodReference, PackageReference, RKeYMetaConstructType, TypeReference, TypeSVWrapper, UncollatedReferenceQualifier, VariableReference
public interface NameReference extends NamedProgramElement, Reference
A NameReference references an entity by its explicite name.
